featured.excerpt: We audited lpac and OpenEUICC — the backbone of open-source eSIM provisioning. TLS validation is completely disabled. DER parser overflows chain into RCE. 12 Critical, 26 High, 6 kill chains. Your SIM credentials are exposed.
